description: Execute active implementation-plan tasks until every authored task in the selected target plan is completed, with an explicit plan-assessment exit gate and deterministic completed-plan archival before final output. If workflowInput.planPath is omitted, select the next incomplete plan from impl-plans/active.

prompts.divedraPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Start by assessing the target implementation plan. If workflowInput.planPath is omitted, select the next incomplete plan from impl-plans/active. If the selected plan is complete, archive completed active plans and refresh plan indexes before publishing workflow output. Otherwise implement the next incomplete task, review it, and reassess the plan. Loop until the assessment reports plan_complete true. Do not commit, push, stage files, or revert unrelated dirty worktree changes.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep plan path, task ids, changed files, verification commands, review findings, routing flags, and remaining work explicit.

steps.description: Read the target implementation plan and decide whether more task implementation is required.
Implement the next incomplete task selected by the plan assessment.
Review the latest implementation iteration and route back for revision or plan reassessment.
Move completed plans out of impl-plans/active and refresh plan indexes before final output.
Publish final evidence that the target implementation plan has no incomplete tasks.
